1.title: Pi360 Institute Management System
1.target: A unified ERP platform for institutions and service-driven organizations to manage education, healthcare, operations, and services from a single ecosystem.
1.overview: Pi360 is a unified digital ecosystem designed to manage complex, real-world organizations within a single platform. It brings education, healthcare, commerce, communication, and operational management together under one secure and scalable system.
1.overview1: The platform enables institutions, hospitals, and service-based organizations to manage people, processes, and services seamlessly—eliminating fragmented tools and disconnected workflows.
challenges: Managing multiple domains such as education, healthcare, and services within a single system
Ensuring strict role-based access control across diverse user groups
Maintaining data consistency and isolation across different organizational units
Coordinating academic, healthcare, and service schedules without conflicts
Scaling the system as organizations and services grow
approach: Designed a centralized identity and role-based access management system
Planned a modular architecture to support multiple domains independently
Structured synchronized academic, healthcare, and service workflows
Defined secure data access boundaries for sensitive information
Adopted real-time processing and background tasks for smooth performance
Focused on dashboard-driven insights for decision-makers
solution: Developed a unified platform integrating education, healthcare, commerce, and operations
Implemented secure identity-based access for students, teachers, doctors, staff, and administrators
Built end-to-end academic management including admissions, courses, exams, and results
Enabled hospital and healthcare workflows with controlled access to patient data
Integrated communication, commerce, transport, and service management into user profiles
Provided centralized dashboards with real-time operational insights
technologies: Core Modules: Identity Management, Academic Management, Healthcare Operations, Communication System, Commerce & Services, Transport & Logistics
results: Unified multiple organizational sectors under a single connected platform
Eliminated data silos across education, healthcare, and service operations
Improved coordination between people, processes, and infrastructure
Enabled secure, role-based access across all organizational domains
Created a scalable foundation for future expansion without system complexity

2.title: GadgetAdda Online E‑Commerce Store
2.target: A local e‑commerce platform for selling organic groceries, oils, honey, spices, nuts & dates across Bangladesh
2.overview: GadgetAdda.xyz is an online single‑vendor e‑commerce store offering organic groceries, oils, honey, spices, nut products, and related items to customers in Bangladesh. It provides a simple online shopping experience with product categories, add‑to‑cart functionality, and order placement options.
2.overview1: The site allows customers to browse different product categories, add items to a cart, place orders, and use delivery options such as Cash‑on‑Delivery or advance bkash payment options.
challenges: Organizing diverse product categories (organic foods, honey, nuts, spices) in a clear and user‑friendly way
Ensuring mobile and desktop users can browse and shop easily
Managing product pricing and discount display accurately
Providing trustworthy delivery options and building customer confidence
Keeping the ordering process simple and low‑friction
approach: Designing an intuitive navigation menu for product categories such as Ghee & Oil, Nuts & Dates, Honey, Spices, etc.
Using a responsive layout so users can shop comfortably on mobile and desktop
Implementing clear product price, discount labeling, and add‑to‑cart button
Integrating order tracking and Cash‑on‑Delivery options visible on the site
Highlighting delivery times, discount information, and trust signals on the homepage logo area
solution: Delivered a straightforward online grocery and organic product store where customers can browse categories, view product details and prices, and place orders
Created a mobile‑friendly and simple UI for customers to easily navigate and shop from various categories
Added clear pricing, discount, and product presentation styles to help buyers choose products confidently
Provided delivery details like times, Cash‑on‑Delivery, advanced bkash discounts, and clear contact information
Kept the shopping flow simple with cart functionality and direct order placement options
technologies: UI & Styling: Responsive layout using modern CSS frameworks
Platform: Standard CMS or custom e‑commerce setup
Deployment: Hosted with integrated domain & SSL
results: Launched a functional online e‑commerce store serving organic groceries and products
Customers can easily browse product categories and place orders
Provided trust signals such as delivery information and payment options
Improved online presence and accessibility for local customers
Set up a base structure for adding more categories or features in the future

3.title: Shobpi E‑commerce Online Store
3.target: A clean, user-friendly online shopping platform for selling beauty and personal care products across Bangladesh
3.overview: Shobpi.com is a single-vendor e-commerce website where a brand directly sells beauty and personal care products online to customers. The website provides easy navigation, product browsing, and a streamlined order placement experience.
3.overview1: The platform is customer-focused, featuring product categories, detailed product pages, a cart system, and order placement functionality, all optimized for both mobile and desktop devices.
challenges: Providing customers with a simple and fast product browsing experience
Ensuring a fully responsive design for mobile users
Presenting product information and pricing clearly
Creating a smooth and hassle-free order placement system
Building trust and credibility as a reliable online store
approach: Enhanced user experience with a clean and simple UI design
Organized product categories and structured product detail pages
Implemented mobile-first responsive design
Simplified cart and checkout flows for easy order placement
Optimized website performance and loading speed
solution: Developed a fully functional single-vendor e-commerce website where the brand manages all products
Provided easy product browsing and category-based navigation for customers
Created detailed product pages showing name, price, and essential information clearly
Built a smooth Add to Cart and Order Placement system for all users
Optimized the layout for both mobile and desktop users
Created a trustworthy online store image to increase customer confidence
Prepared the structure for future payment gateway integration and order tracking features
technologies: UI & Styling: Responsive layout using modern CSS techniques
Deployment: Web hosting with domain integration
results: Successfully launched a fully functional online store
Customers can browse products and place orders easily
Provided a smooth shopping experience for mobile users
Increased the brand's online presence and credibility
Created a strong foundation for future feature upgrades

4.title: Shoshikha (স্বশিক্ষা)
4.target: To bridge the gap between traditional learning and industry demands by providing authentic mentorship and real-world tech insights. We empower learners to transition from basic coding to professional excellence through hands-on industry practices.
4.overview: Shoshikha is a self-learning focused education initiative built on the belief that true learning happens when a learner is internally motivated to grow.
4.overview1: The institute is designed to guide learners from basic knowledge to professional excellence in the tech industry through structured resources, expert mentorship, and real-world project experience.
challenges: Transitioning from following tutorials to building a system from scratch without copy-pasting
Structuring backend architecture correctly for scalability and maintainability
Implementing secure authentication and permission systems
Designing APIs that are robust, validated, and easy to maintain
Managing deployment workflows including Docker, Git, and cloud deployment for production
approach: Started by understanding the full backend workflow: client-server communication, request handling, and database interactions
Designed the database schema and backend architecture before coding
Followed a practice-driven approach: learned a concept, applied it immediately in small modules, then integrated into the main project
Implemented APIs step by step with proper validation, error handling, and authentication
Used Git and GitHub for version control, and gradually learned deployment pipelines to cloud platforms
solution: Developed a complete backend project using Django and Django REST Framework with PostgreSQL database
Implemented user authentication, permissions, and throttling for secure API access
Created 10+ small practice modules to reinforce each concept before integrating into the main project
Tested APIs using professional tools to ensure functionality and reliability
Deployed the backend system to a cloud environment using Docker containers and Git-based deployment pipelines
Maintained documentation and code reviews to simulate real-world professional workflows
technologies: Backend: Python, Django, Django REST Framework
Deployment: Docker, Cloud Deployment (e.g., Heroku, AWS), Git & GitHub
results: Gained confidence in designing and deploying production-ready backend systems
Learned to write clean, maintainable, and scalable code
Understood real-world backend development workflows including version control, testing, and deployment
Prepared a portfolio-ready backend project for interviews and freelance opportunities
Acquired practical experience in API design, database modeling, and secure authentication implementation

5.title: POS & ERP Solution
5.target: Unified data across multiple educational institutions
5.overview: Pi 360 is a multi-campus, data-driven educational ERP platform designed to bridge the gap between administration, teachers, and students.
5.overview1: Provides a centralised control-tower dashboard for management, offers personalised dashboards for students and teachers, accessible via web and mobile applications.
challenges: Maintaining real-time data synchronization across multiple campuses
Handling large-scale institutional data without performance degradation
Implementing secure role-based access for students, teachers, and administrators
Integrating legacy systems with modern cloud-based infrastructure
Ensuring uninterrupted service during peak academic and admission periods
approach: Designed a scalable, centralised multi-campus system architecture
Planned cloud-native infrastructure to handle high traffic and peak loads
Defined role-based authentication and authorization strategies
Performed legacy data auditing and structured migration planning
Adopted caching and asynchronous processing for performance-critical modules
Planned advanced analytics and reporting using data visualisation tools
solution: Designed a scalable, centralised multi-campus system architecture
Planned cloud-native infrastructure to handle high traffic and peak loads
Defined role-based authentication and authorization strategies
Performed legacy data auditing and structured migration planning
Adopted caching and asynchronous processing for performance-critical modules
Planned advanced analytics and reporting using data visualisation tools
technologies: Modules: Admissions Management, Attendance Tracking, Grading System, Finance Management, Internal Communication System
results: Maintained 99.99% system uptime across all campuses
Successfully migrated over 10TB of legacy institutional data with zero downtime
Enabled predictive analytics for revenue forecasting and student growth analysis
Achieved real-time, consistent data access across all campuses
Significantly improved system performance and user experience

7.title: Import-Export Management System
7.target: To digitize and streamline import–export operations, documentation, and tracking for small to mid-scale trading businesses.
7.overview: This project focuses on building a centralized Import–Export Management System to manage shipments, documents, partners, and operational workflows digitally.
7.overview1: The system is designed to reduce manual paperwork, improve data accuracy, and provide clear visibility into import–export operations through a structured web-based dashboard.
challenges: Managing complex import–export documentation in a structured digital format
Tracking shipment status and trade records without relying on spreadsheets
Ensuring data consistency across multiple operational modules
Designing role-based access for admins, operators, and finance users
Building a system flexible enough to adapt to changing trade workflows
approach: Analyzed real-world import–export workflows before designing the system
Designed a modular backend architecture to separate shipments, documents, and partner management
Planned database schemas carefully to handle relational trade data
Implemented role-based authentication to control access and responsibilities
Focused on clean UI and clear data representation for daily operational use
solution: Developed a centralized web-based Import–Export Management System
Implemented modules for shipment tracking, document management, and partner records
Created secure role-based authentication for different user types
Ensured structured CRUD operations with proper validation and error handling
Integrated dashboards to provide operational visibility and reporting support
results: Reduced dependency on manual paperwork and spreadsheet-based tracking
Improved accuracy and consistency of import–export records
Enabled faster access to shipment and document information
Provided a scalable foundation for future automation and reporting features
Delivered a portfolio-ready enterprise-style management system
